news.summary: On May 7, 2025, in Boston, Air Space Intelligence (ASI), a leading company specializing in AI-powered operations software for various industries, revealed that General Jackie Van Ovost, U.S. Air Force (Ret.), has become a strategic advisor. This prestigious addition signifies ASI's commitment to enhancing its capabilities and expertise.
news.headline: Retired General Jacqueline Van Ovost joins Air Space Intelligence as a strategic advisor, pioneering AI-powered logistics for DOD.

news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones saw a surge in the stock market as trade deal discussions between the U.S. and China progressed. Google witnessed a decline following an announcement from Apple. The Federal Reserve decided to keep rates unchanged, which led to a slight fade in the Dow Jones. President Trump made a significant statement. Additionally, Cathie Wood sold Palantir stock. The latest updates on these market movements can be found on Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Dow Jones up on U.S.-China trade deal; Google shares fall; Cathie Wood sells Palantir stock. Fed leaves rates unchanged.

news.summary: Lenovo based in Research Triangle Park, North Carolina is providing special deals for consumers and small businesses in anticipation of Memorial Day. The renowned tech company is offering limited-time promotions on its diverse range of devices, catering to different needs. This includes the dependable ThinkPad series tailored for professionals, the powerful Legion lineup designed for gamers, and the versatile Yoga 2-in-1s perfect for creative individuals handling multiple tasks. Lenovo emphasizes that their offers go beyond just discounts - they aim to assist customers in making informed and beneficial tech upgrades.
news.headline: Lenovo offering up to 54% off during Memorial Day Sale on various devices for consumers and small businesses.

news.summary: Investors are feeling cautious as Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell expresses concerns about the inflation risk stemming from President Trump's tariffs. Powell highlighted the possibility of stagflation and increasing uncertainty in the market. As a result, the S&P 500 index has been fluctuating, reflecting the unease among investors. Powell emphasized that there is no rush to make any sudden decisions in this volatile economic climate.
news.headline: Fed Chair Powell warns of stagflation risk amid rising uncertainty. S&P 500 wavers as investors cautious about inflation due to Trump tariffs.

news.summary: In May 7, 2025, in Lincoln, Nebraska, new data from Sandhills Global reveals a notable increase in inventory levels for used piston single and turboprop aircraft on Sandhills platforms. This trend began in March and continued to rise throughout April. The reports indicate a continuous climb in these inventory levels during this period, signifying ongoing market adjustments in the aviation sector.
news.headline: Used aircraft values decreased in April across all categories, with inventory levels for piston single and turboprop aircraft rising, following consecutive monthly increases starting in March.

news.summary: On May 7, 2025, Apperio, a London-based company specializing in legal spend management AI software, was acquired by PERSUIT with the assistance of JEGI CLARITY. Apperio offers a unique solution for tracking and managing legal spending in real-time, enabling legal departments to effectively monitor their expenditures. This acquisition marks a significant development in the legal tech industry, involving key players in the sector.
news.headline: Apperio, a legal spend management AI software, sold to PERSUIT with advisement from JEGI CLARITY. London-based company.

news.summary: The introduction of the Save Healthcare Workers Act in Schaumburg, Illinois on May 7, 2025, marks a significant milestone for healthcare workers nationwide. This legislation comes as a response to the escalating levels of violence, especially in emergency departments where emergency nurses are disproportionately affected. The act aims to address this critical issue and provide much-needed protection for healthcare workers across the country. As reported, incidents of violence in healthcare settings have surged to alarming numbers, highlighting the urgency of implementing comprehensive measures to safeguard the well-being of those in the healthcare industry.
news.headline: ENA supports Save Healthcare Workers Act to combat workplace violence in emergency departments as nurses are vulnerable.

news.summary: On May 7, 2025, AusperBio Therapeutics, Inc. and Ausper Biopharma Co., Ltd. (collectively known as AusperBio), a clinical-stage biotech firm, shared the end-of-treatment (EOT) clinical findings from the Phase IIb study of AHB-137. The presentation included data from an ongoing trial, highlighting key insights on the drug's efficacy and safety. This collaborative effort aims to advance research in the field of biotechnology and potentially offer promising prospects in the medical sector.
news.headline: AusperBio presents Phase IIb AHB-137 clinical data at EASL Congress 2025. End-of-treatment results shared from ongoing trial.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that over 3,000 new cases of COVID-19 were confirmed in the country, bringing the total number of confirmed cases to more than 50,000. Additionally, the death toll has risen to over 800 as 20 new fatalities were recorded. This spike in cases has put a strain on the healthcare system, with hospitals nearing full capacity. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety measures such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing to curb the spread of the virus. The government is considering implementing stricter restrictions to control the situation.

news.summary: Blue Yonder has revealed the recipients of its Partner Awards, honoring partners for their excellence in enhancing digital supply chain strategies for customer operations. The awarded partners include Shipium as the Independent Software Vendor (ISV) Partner of the Year, Renovotec as the Edge Program Partner of the Year, and Microsoft as the Technology Partner of the Year. These annual awards celebrate exceptional success in partnership, acknowledging the vital role partners play in driving transformative results.
news.headline: Blue Yonder recognizes partner success with annual awards: ISV Partner - Shipium Edge, Program Partner - Renovotec, Technology Partner - Microsoft.

news.summary: In Richmond, Virginia, the board of directors of Dominion Energy (NYSE: D) announced a quarterly dividend of 66.75 cents per common stock share. Shareholders of record by May 29, 2025, will receive the dividend on June 20, 2025. This will mark the 389th consecutive dividend payment by Dominion Energy or its predecessor company. The previous quarterly dividend was declared on January 24, 2025. This news falls under the Corporate & Financial category.
news.headline: Dominion Energy declares dividend of 66.75 cents per share, payable on June 20, 2025 to shareholders of record on May 29, 2025.

news.summary: According to a report from Google Threat Intelligence, the threat group COLDRIVER is utilizing a new malware named LOSTKEYS to steal documents from Western targets. The malware signifies the group's transition from credential phishing to more sophisticated attacks and is installed in four steps involving a lure website, a PowerShell script, device evasion, and payload retrieval. LOSTKEYS can steal files from directories and extensions, extract system information, and send data to COLDRIVER. Google has taken measures to address the threat, adding malicious websites to its "Safe Browsing" feature. COLDRIVER, a Russian-backed group, targets high-profile Western individuals such as diplomats and journalists. In a related trend, crypto hack losses hit $2 billion in the first quarter of 2025, surpassing all losses from 2024. Major vulnerabilities include operational flaws and weak access controls, with attackers increasingly using social engineering tactics. Noteworthy was the $1.5 billion hack on cryptocurrency exchange Bybit by the Lazarus Group in February.
news.headline: COLDRIVER group presents new malware LOSTKEYS to steal from Western targets, Google report states. Company takes steps to mitigate any damage caused by the malware. LOSTKEYS is capable of stealing files and sending system information back to COLDRIVER. Losses from crypto hacks reach $2 billion in Q1 2025, surpassing total losses for 2024. Hacken report highlights operational flaws and social engineering tactics as key vulnerabilities. Bybit exchange suffers $1.5 billion hack orchestrated by Lazarus Group.

news.summary: Investors are cautious as Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell expresses concerns about the inflation impact of President Trump's tariffs. The Fed and Powell warn of the risk of stagflation and increasing uncertainty, leading to a slight increase in the S&P 500.
news.headline: Jerome Powell warns of stagflation risk due to Trump tariffs, raising uncertainty. S&P 500 edges higher.
